title: TRANS REENTRY SUPPORT PROGRAM
description: Dedicated reentry navigation for trans people leaving incarceration. The 72 hours post-release are highest risk for housing discrimination, healthcare gaps, and re-arrest. We provide immediate, life-saving stabilization.

title: COMMUNITY BAIL & RELEASE NAVIGATION
description: Pretrial detention is where significant harm concentrates for LGBTQ+ people—misgendering, denial of healthcare, and isolation. Our rapid release support reduces exposure time and connects individuals to trauma-informed care.

title: TRAUMA-INFORMED LEGAL NAVIGATION
description: Specialized legal navigation that integrates trauma-informed practice into every interaction, reducing case attrition for survivors of violence and marginalized individuals navigating hostile courts.

title: LGBTQ+ YOUTH DIVERSION PROGRAMS
description: Pre-arrest and pre-adjudication diversion programming to prevent pipeline entry for LGBTQ+ youth. We know that early diversion is the highest-leverage intervention to prevent long-term criminalization.

title: FINES, COSTS & GARNISHMENT RELIEF
description: Court fines and cost garnishment trap people in cycles of poverty. IRN identifies relief pathways and documents patterns of predatory fee assessment to advocate for systemic legislative change.

title: LEGAL EDUCATION & KNOW YOUR RIGHTS
description: We deliver Know Your Rights workshops covering police encounters, pretrial detention, and tenant rights, empowering LGBTQ+ people and communities of color to challenge unlawful treatment and avoid procedural traps.

title: COMMUNITY HARM REPORTING (CHRT)
description: IRN's privacy-first tool documents civil rights incidents anonymously. Our zero-knowledge architecture ensures we cannot be compelled to identify reporters, building an undeniable evidentiary record of systemic abuse.
